abide.en: Everyone must abide by the rules.
abide.zh: 每個人都必須遵守規則。

aboriginal.zh: 這座博物館展示原住民藝術。

abound.en: Fish abound in this clean river.
abound.zh: 這條乾淨的河裡魚很多。

abstraction.en: Time is an abstraction that is hard to define.
abstraction.zh: 時間是個難以定義的抽象概念。

abundance.en: There was an abundance of food at the feast.

academy.en: She studies at a music academy.
academy.zh: 她在一所音樂學院就讀。

accessory.en: A scarf is a useful accessory.

acclaim.en: The film won great acclaim from critics.
acclaim.zh: 這部電影獲得了影評人的高度讚揚。

accordance.en: We acted in accordance with the rules.

accordingly.en: The weather changed, so we planned accordingly.
accordingly.zh: 天氣變了，所以我們相應地調整計畫。

accountable.en: Leaders are accountable for their decisions.
accountable.zh: 領導者要為自己的決定負責。

accumulate.en: Dust accumulated on the old books.

accumulation.en: The accumulation of snow blocked the road.

accustom.en: It takes time to accustom yourself to the cold.

acne.zh: 許多青少年為青春痘煩惱。

acre.zh: 這座農場佔地五十英畝。

adaptation.en: The film is an adaptation of a novel.
adaptation.zh: 這部電影改編自一本小說。

addiction.en: Phone addiction is a modern problem.
addiction.zh: 手機成癮是個現代問題。

admiral.en: The admiral commanded the whole fleet.
admiral.zh: 這位上將統領整支艦隊。

adolescence.en: Adolescence is a time of big changes.
adolescence.zh: 青春期是個變化很大的時期。

advisory.en: The weather service issued an advisory.
advisory.zh: 氣象單位發布了一則警示。

aesthetic.en: The garden was designed for aesthetic beauty.
aesthetic.zh: 這座花園是為了美感而設計的。

affectionate.en: She gave her dog an affectionate hug.
affectionate.zh: 她深情地抱了抱她的狗。

affiliate.en: The store is an affiliate of a big chain.
affiliate.zh: 這家店是一個大型連鎖的加盟店。

affirm.en: She affirmed that the report was true.
affirm.zh: 她確認這份報告是真的。

airtight.en: Keep the cookies in an airtight box.
airtight.zh: 把餅乾放在密封的盒子裡。

airway.en: The doctor kept the patient's airway clear.
airway.zh: 醫生保持病人的呼吸道暢通。

algebra.en: We learn algebra in math class.

alienate.en: Rude words can alienate your friends.
alienate.zh: 無禮的話會讓你的朋友疏遠你。

align.en: Please align the photos in a row.

allege.en: They allege that he broke the rule.
allege.zh: 他們指稱他違反了規則。

alligator.en: An alligator rested by the riverbank.
alligator.zh: 一隻短吻鱷在河岸邊休息。

altitude.en: The plane flew at a high altitude.

aluminum.en: The cans are made of aluminum.

ambiguity.en: The ambiguity in the sentence confused us.
ambiguity.zh: 句子裡的歧義讓我們困惑。

amid-amidst.en: She stayed calm amid the noise.
amid-amidst.zh: 在喧鬧之中她保持冷靜。

analogy.en: He used an analogy to explain the idea.
analogy.zh: 他用一個類比來解釋這個想法。

anchor.en: The ship dropped its anchor in the bay.

animate.en: Artists animate the characters frame by frame.
animate.zh: 動畫師逐格製作這些角色的動畫。

annoyance.en: The buzzing fly was a real annoyance.
annoyance.zh: 那隻嗡嗡叫的蒼蠅真令人煩。

anthem.en: Everyone stood for the national anthem.

anticipation.en: We waited in anticipation of the results.
anticipation.zh: 我們滿懷期待地等待結果。

applaud.en: The crowd applauded the brave act.
applaud.zh: 群眾為這勇敢的舉動鼓掌。

applicable.en: This rule is applicable to everyone.
applicable.zh: 這條規則適用於每個人。

apprentice.en: The young apprentice learned from the master.
apprentice.zh: 年輕的學徒向師傅學習。

archaeology.en: She is interested in archaeology and old ruins.
archaeology.zh: 她對考古學和古蹟有興趣。

archive.en: Old photos are kept in the archive.
archive.zh: 舊照片被保存在檔案室裡。

arithmetic.zh: 簡單的算術對購物很有幫助。

ascend.en: The balloon began to ascend slowly.

aspire.en: She aspires to become a scientist.
aspire.zh: 她渴望成為一名科學家。

assassinate.en: In the story, rebels tried to assassinate the king.
assassinate.zh: 在故事裡，叛軍試圖暗殺國王。

asthma.en: He carries an inhaler because of his asthma.
asthma.zh: 因為氣喘，他隨身帶著吸入器。

astray.en: The hikers went astray in the fog.

astronaut.en: The astronaut walked on the moon.
astronaut.zh: 這位太空人在月球上行走。

astronomer.en: The astronomer studied a distant star.
astronomer.zh: 天文學家研究一顆遙遠的星星。

astronomy.en: She reads books about astronomy and stars.
astronomy.zh: 她讀關於天文學和星星的書。

attain.en: Through hard work, she attained her goal.
attain.zh: 透過努力，她達成了目標。

audit.en: The company had an audit of its accounts.
audit.zh: 這家公司對帳目進行了審計。

auditorium.en: The concert was held in the auditorium.

avert.zh: 迅速的行動避免了一場災難。

aviation.en: He works in the aviation industry.

awesome.en: The view from the top was awesome.
awesome.zh: 從頂端看的景色很驚人。

awhile.en: Let's rest awhile before we continue.
awhile.zh: 我們繼續之前先休息一會兒吧。

bachelor.en: He earned a bachelor's degree in science.
bachelor.zh: 他取得了理學學士學位。

backbone.en: Hard workers are the backbone of the team.
backbone.zh: 認真的員工是團隊的支柱。

badge.en: The police officer showed his badge.

banquet.en: The king held a grand banquet.
banquet.zh: 國王舉辦了一場盛大的宴會。

barbarian.en: The history book described ancient barbarians.
barbarian.zh: 歷史書描述了古代的蠻族。

bass.en: He sings in a deep bass voice.
bass.zh: 他用低沉的男低音歌唱。

batter.en: She mixed the batter for the pancakes.
batter.zh: 她攪拌了做鬆餅的麵糊。

beautify.en: They planted flowers to beautify the street.

beep.en: The microwave gave a loud beep.
beep.zh: 微波爐發出一聲響亮的嗶聲。

beforehand.zh: 事先把你的包包準備好。

bilateral.en: The two countries held bilateral talks.
bilateral.zh: 這兩個國家舉行了雙邊會談。

blaze.en: Firefighters fought the blaze for hours.
blaze.zh: 消防員與大火搏鬥了好幾個小時。

bleach.en: She used bleach to whiten the shirt.
bleach.zh: 她用漂白水把襯衫漂白。

blond-blonde.en: The child has curly blond hair.
blond-blonde.zh: 這個孩子有一頭金色的捲髮。

blot.en: There is an ink blot on the page.

blunt.en: The knife is too blunt to cut.

bodily.en: Sleep is a basic bodily need.
bodily.zh: 睡眠是基本的身體需求。

booklet.en: The booklet explains how to use the device.
booklet.zh: 這本小冊子說明如何使用這個裝置。

bosom.en: She held the baby to her bosom.

boulevard.zh: 寬闊的林蔭大道兩旁種著樹。

boxing.en: He trains in boxing every evening.

boycott.zh: 人們抵制那家不公平的公司。

brace.en: She wears a brace to straighten her teeth.

brassiere-bra.en: The shop sells women's clothing such as a bra.
brassiere-bra.zh: 這家店賣女性服飾，例如胸罩。

breadth.en: The breadth of the river is impressive.
breadth.zh: 這條河的寬度令人印象深刻。

breakdown.en: The car had a breakdown on the highway.
breakdown.zh: 車子在高速公路上拋錨了。

breakup.en: After the breakup, they stayed friends.

bribe.en: It is illegal to bribe an official.

brink.en: The company was on the brink of failure.

brochure.en: She picked up a travel brochure.

broil.en: She broiled the fish until golden.

brook.en: A small brook ran through the woods.

broth.en: She made a warm chicken broth.
broth.zh: 她煮了一鍋溫熱的雞高湯。

brotherhood.en: The team felt a strong brotherhood.
brotherhood.zh: 這支隊伍有著深厚的兄弟情誼。

bulky.en: The bulky box was hard to carry.
bulky.zh: 這個笨重的箱子很難搬。

bureaucrat.zh: 一位官員處理了這些文件。

bypass.en: We took the bypass to avoid the city.
bypass.zh: 我們走外環道避開市區。

caffeine.en: Coffee contains a lot of caffeine.
caffeine.zh: 咖啡含有大量的咖啡因。

calculator.en: She used a calculator to add the numbers.
calculator.zh: 她用計算機把數字加起來。

cape.en: The lighthouse stands on a rocky cape.
cape.zh: 燈塔矗立在一個多岩石的海岬上。

caption.en: Each photo has a short caption.
caption.zh: 每張照片都有簡短的說明文字。

captive.en: The bird was kept captive in a cage.

captivity.en: Some animals do not breed in captivity.
captivity.zh: 有些動物在圈養下不會繁殖。

cardboard.en: We packed the books in cardboard boxes.

cardinal.en: Honesty is a cardinal rule in our home.
cardinal.zh: 誠實是我們家最重要的原則。

carefree.en: She enjoyed a carefree summer holiday.
carefree.zh: 她享受了一個無憂無慮的暑假。

caretaker.en: The caretaker looks after the old building.
caretaker.zh: 管理員照顧這棟老建築。

carton.en: He drank a carton of milk.

cashier.en: The cashier gave me my change.

casualty.en: There were no casualties in the accident.

catastrophe.en: The flood was a terrible catastrophe.
catastrophe.zh: 這場洪水是個可怕的大災難。

cater.en: The company catered the wedding dinner.
cater.zh: 這家公司承辦了婚宴的餐飲。

caterpillar.en: A caterpillar turns into a butterfly.

cavity.en: The dentist filled the cavity in my tooth.
cavity.zh: 牙醫補了我牙齒上的蛀洞。

celery.en: She added celery to the soup.

cellular.en: The body is made of cellular structures.
cellular.zh: 身體是由細胞結構構成的。

cement.en: They mixed cement to build the wall.

census.en: The census counts the country's people.
census.zh: 人口普查統計國家的人口。

ceramic.en: She makes ceramic bowls by hand.

certify.en: The doctor certified that he was healthy.

chant.en: The fans chanted the team's name.
chant.zh: 球迷們高喊著球隊的名字。

charitable.en: She does charitable work for the poor.

checkup.en: He went to the doctor for a checkup.
checkup.zh: 他去看醫生做健康檢查。

chemist.en: The chemist mixed two liquids carefully.
chemist.zh: 化學家小心地混合兩種液體。

chili.en: The dish is hot because of the chili.
chili.zh: 這道菜因為辣椒而很辣。

chimpanzee.en: A chimpanzee is a clever animal.
chimpanzee.zh: 黑猩猩是種聰明的動物。

chirp.en: Birds chirp happily in the morning.
chirp.zh: 鳥兒在早晨愉快地啁啾。

cholesterol.en: Too much fried food raises cholesterol.
cholesterol.zh: 吃太多油炸食物會提高膽固醇。

cigar.en: The old man smoked a cigar after dinner.
cigar.zh: 那位老人晚餐後抽了根雪茄。

civilize.en: Schools help to civilize young people.
civilize.zh: 學校有助於教化年輕人。

clam.en: We dug for clams on the beach.

clasp.en: She clasped her hands in joy.
clasp.zh: 她開心地把雙手握在一起。

clearance.en: The store had a clearance sale.
clearance.zh: 這家店舉行了清倉大拍賣。

climax.en: The story reaches its climax at the end.

clockwise.en: Turn the lid clockwise to close it.
clockwise.zh: 順時針轉動蓋子來關緊。

clone.en: Scientists cloned a sheep years ago.
clone.zh: 多年前科學家複製了一隻羊。

closure.en: The road closure caused a long delay.
closure.zh: 道路封閉造成了長時間的延誤。

collision.zh: 這場碰撞損壞了兩輛車。

colloquial.en: 'Gonna' is a colloquial form of 'going to'.

comet.en: A bright comet appeared in the sky.
comet.zh: 一顆明亮的彗星出現在天空中。

commonplace.zh: 智慧型手機現在很普遍。

commonwealth.zh: 這個國協包含許多國家。

compass.en: Hikers use a compass to find direction.
compass.zh: 登山客用指南針來辨別方向。

compile.en: She compiled a list of useful words.
compile.zh: 她整理了一份有用的單字清單。

complement.en: The wine complements the meal nicely.

complexion.en: She has a clear, healthy complexion.
complexion.zh: 她有著乾淨健康的膚色。
